query:
-- Find Daniel Zec's user config
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.territories, u.digestEnabled
FROM users u 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Zec%' OR u.name LIKE '%Daniel%' OR u.email LIKE '%zec%' OR u.email LIKE '%daniel%'
LIMIT 5;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute
